sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29923" key="e)/bhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔβην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐβησάμην</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐβήσετο</orth>, <sense id="n29923.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">βαίνω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
